case_title: TAYLOR VS A P GREEN INDUSTRIES INC

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL - CIVIL

LAW AND MOTION 301, TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL. MOVING PARTY APPEARED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- PAUL & HANLEY LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF -- GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II REPORTER: PATRICIA EVEZICH CSR#1193
PROOF OF SERVICE TO ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL;ON JULY 23,2002; FOR PERSONAL SERVICE;
